description: Photograph of a construction site near Malaga, Spain. The foreground shows an expanse of bare, dry earth. Two tall white poles with plain yellow flags are positioned in the midground. A utility pole stands centrally, and to its right, a mound of earth holds a white sign board with a blue border and unreadable text. In the background, several multi-story buildings, appearing to be partially constructed or recently completed, are visible under a clear blue sky. The image credits M. Palacios.
